-- Auto-converted from GraalScript joinResource("sign") -- [CLIENT-SIDE — server no-op] -- if (created) setstring this.text,#s(vince_diesel)Greetings and Welcome.. -- #b -- The Red Dragon Inn Hostel#b -- have two rooms available for you.#b -- To enter a room say open1/open2.#b -- I hope you will enjoy you stay#b -- at Big Citys best Hostel..#b;
